trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 66.6 in the bullish momentum zone, MACD above signal AND histogram rising (accelerating momentum), price above SMA-20 — ideal entry in today's risk-on tape with NASDAQ +2.1%.

decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ +2.1% leading and S&P 500 +1.2% — growth and momentum names are in the driver's seat heading into Q2 close. Cash sits at $577 with 4 open slots, so deploying into SOFI which has the full momentum signal stack (MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI in the sweet spot at 66.6) and benefits most from the fintech/growth bid on a day like today. Existing positions held — stop-loss and profit-target triggers are handled automatically by the risk engine.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied broadly on the last trading day of Q2 2026, with tech and growth stocks leading as institutional fund managers engaged in quarter-end window dressing — buying recent winners to improve portfolio optics before reporting. The NASDAQ's outperformance (+2.1% vs S&P 500's +1.2%) reflects continued enthusiasm for AI infrastructure and fintech names, sectors that have driven outsized returns through H1. Risk-on sentiment was reinforced by stable macro signals and no major negative catalysts, giving buyers confidence to add exposure.
market_education.summary_zh: 在2026年第二季度最後一個交易日，市場普遍走強，科技及成長股領漲。機構基金經理在季末積極買入近期強勢股，以美化季報持倉結構，此舉助推了整體升勢。那斯達克指數漲幅（+2.1%）明顯優於標普500（+1.2%），反映市場對人工智能基礎設施及金融科技板塊的持續熱情——這兩大主題主導了上半年的超額回報。宏觀面穩定、無重大利空消息，令買盤信心充足，市場整體呈現明顯的風險偏好格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Window dressing happens at the end of a quarter when fund managers buy stocks that have been performing well — not because they just discovered them, but to make their portfolio look good in the quarterly report sent to investors. It creates artificial demand that can push prices higher in the final days of March, June, September, and December.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「粉飾櫥窗」（Window Dressing）是指基金經理在每個季度末，買入近期表現亮眼的股票，目的並非看好後市，而是希望在寄給投資人的季報中，讓持倉看起來更漂亮。這種行為在每年3月、6月、9月及12月底會製造人為需求，往往推動強勢股在季末最後幾個交易日進一步上漲。
